expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Type: Business (RP revenue), tax reserve, operating, personal income pool each labeled separately

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Gives next action: 'confirm Oakside engagement kickoff date and add completion invoice to calendar'

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: No generic advice — only specific ledger update, Q2 pacing, tax deadline reminder

expectations.text: Calculates Q2 progress percentage correctly ($4,500 of $35,000 = ~13%)
Notes the remaining $4,500 balance owed on the engagement
expectations.evidence: Remaining Balance: $4,500 (due on completion) listed in transaction details
